2605.07305.title: MedAction: Towards Active Multi-turn Clinical Diagnostic LLMs
2605.07305.paper_summary: Most existing LLM diagnoses are evaluated on static, single-turn settings where complete patient information is provided upfront, an oversimplification of real clinical practice. We study active diagnosis: the real-life clinical process of starting from initial observation, ordering tests, interpreting results, and updating a differential diagnosis across multiple turns. Through systematic analysis, we identify three recurring failure modes in current LLMs: ungrounded test ordering, unreliable diagnostic update, and degraded multi-turn coherence. Together, these failures reveal a core deficit: existing medical training data teaches models to reason from complete information but not to act under evolving, partial evidence. To address this gap, we introduce MedAction, a tree-structured distillation pipeline that synthesizes diverse and high-quality multi-turn diagnostic trajectories via LLM-environment interaction. We propose two knowledge-graph-grounded metrics to filter trajectory quality: Disease Trajectory Consistency (DTC), which tracks whether the model's hypothesis converges toward the correct diagnosis, and Reasoning-Action Consistency (RAC), which verifies that belief updates are driven by gathered evidence. Using this pipeline, we construct MedAction-32K, a dataset of 32,681 trajectories from 2,896 PMC cases. Fine-tuning an 8B model on MedAction-32K achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source models on both MedR-Bench and our curated MedAction-300-Hard benchmark, pushing the edge for open-source medical LLMs.
2605.07305.paper_summary_zh: 大多數現有的 LLM 診斷是在靜態的單回合設置中評估的，這些設置中提供了完整的病人信息，這是對真實臨床實踐的過度簡化。<lb/>我們研究主動診斷：從初步觀察開始，訂購檢查，解釋結果，並在多輪中更新鑑別診斷的真實臨床過程。<lb/>通過系統分析，我們確定了當前 LLM 中三種反覆出現的失敗模式：無根據的檢查訂購、不可靠的診斷更新和退化的多回合一致性。<lb/>這些失敗共同揭示了一個核心缺陷：現有的醫學訓練數據教會模型從完整信息中推理，但不教它們在不斷演變的部分證據下行動。<lb/>為了解決這一差距，我們引入了 MedAction，一個樹狀結構的蒸餾管道，通過 LLM 環境互動合成多樣且高質量的多回合診斷軌跡。<lb/>我們提出了兩個基於知識圖譜的度量來過濾軌跡質量：疾病軌跡一致性（DTC），跟踪模型的假設是否朝著正確診斷收斂，以及推理-行動一致性（RAC），驗證信念更新是否由收集的證據驅動。<lb/>使用這個管道，我們構建了 MedAction-32K，一個來自 2,896 個 PMC 案例的 32,681 條軌跡數據集。<lb/>在 MedAction-32K 上對一個 8B 模型進行微調，在 MedR-Bench 和我們策劃的 MedAction-300-Hard 基準上達到了開源模型中的最先進性能，推進了開源醫學 LLM 的邊界。
2605.07305.author: Hsin-Ling Hsu et.al.
2605.07305.authors: Hsin-Ling Hsu, Zizheng Wang, Donghua Zhang, Nai-Chia Chen, Jerry Wang, Jun-En Ding, Chia-Hsuan Hsu, Guoan Wang, Feng Liu, Fang-Ming Hung, Chenwei Wu, Liyue Shen
